title: oryctanthes ligustrina
intro: Oryctanthes ligustrina, also known as the 'strangler fig of the Andes', is a type of aquatic plant native to South America. The medicinal properties of Oryctanthes ligustrina include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its ability to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of Oryctanthes ligustrina are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
